title: Oscillation Criterion via Liminf and Limsup
statement:
Let $(x_n)$ be a bounded real sequence. Then
\[
 \liminf_{n\to\infty}x_n
 <
 \limsup_{n\to\infty}x_n
\]
if and only if $(x_n)$ has two distinct subsequential limits.

current_dependencies.title: Liminf Is the Smallest Subsequential Limit
Limsup Is the Largest Subsequential Limit
